creator: dr@domix.de
text:
I just noticed that after installing the proftpd-1.2.0p6 port,
	there are '/usr/local/etc/proftpd.conf' and
	'/usr/local/etc/proftpd.conf.default'.  There's no difference between
	these two files.  Both are executable. (not needed IMHO).
	'/usr/local/etc/proftpd.conf' is not listed in the PLIST.
